message:
✨ Add Node Exec mode to Node Debug card (#1013)

Adds a second tab "Node Exec" that uses `kubectl debug node/<name>` to
run commands directly on nodes via ephemeral debug pods. Features:
- Image selector (busybox, alpine, ubuntu, netshoot)
- Quick exec buttons: Disk, Memory, CPU, Processes, Network, OS Info, Mounts, Uptime
- Custom command input for arbitrary shell commands
- Orange-themed UI to distinguish exec mode from inspect mode

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
